name: Benz Mining Corp.
description: Benz Mining Corp. is a mineral exploration company focused on acquiring and developing high-grade gold, nickel, copper, and platinum group element (PGE) projects in tier-one mining jurisdictions. The company's flagship asset is the Eastmain Gold Project, located in the James Bay region of Quebec, Canada, which hosts high-grade gold mineralization. Benz Mining is committed to utilizing modern exploration techniques, including electromagnetic surveys, to expand known resources and make new discoveries.
